title: What is a File?
drDigitalIntro: A file is anything you save on your laptop — a photo, a document, a video, a song. Every file has a name and lives somewhere on your computer. When you take a photo with your phone or write a document, you're creating a file. Let me show you what files look like.
drDigitalSuccess: Now you know files are just saved information on your computer.
drDigitalHint: Think about the last thing you saved on your computer — that's a file!
